violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the dishwasher was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Establishment to sanitize in 3 bay sink until serviced and dispensing proper concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (weighing table) was observed with an accumulation of rodent droppings. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and brown biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The following food items were observed stored out of refrigeration at the cookline area at the time of inspection... 1) Bean sprouts, noodles and cut lettuce were observed held out of refrigeration on cookline at 54-57 degrees Fahrenheit. 2) Eggs were observed held out of refrigeration in food preparation area at 60 degrees Fahrenheit. Per interview with PIC, food items have been out of refrigeration for less than 2 hours prior. All food items were relocated to ice bath at time of inspection. Reviewed proper cold holding procedures with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Soup was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
Various foods were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
Various foods located in reach-in freezer were uncovered and unprotected from contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice used for drinks. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
Refrigerator (bar) door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of: 1. Light shield (previous water damage)2. Shelving throughout kitchen (food residue/other debris) New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
Three bay sink located in the bar area was in poor repair. Inspector observed leak from top faucet. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of Quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025
Establishment is lacking hot water. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025
The establishment is lacking a waste disposal unit. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025
Observed leaking pipe under hand sink at time of inspection. Plumbing systems to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025
The three bay sink located at the bar was in poor repair, inspector observed leak from faucet. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025
